---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Problem It Solves

What is currently difficult or impossible that this would fix?

## Proposed Solution

How you imagine it working. Include API or CLI examples if relevant.

## Invariant Check

Confirm the D1 invariant is preserved: goal_text must still reach executing agents verbatim.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches and why you ruled them out.

## Additional Context

Related issues or architecture docs.
